const T = {
  blue:"#1B4B8A",sky:"#29ABE2",orange:"#F07A1A",orangeLt:"#F8A252",
  gold:"#F59E0B",goldLt:"#FCD34D",pi:"#6B21A8",piLt:"#9333EA",
  green:"#10B981",red:"#EF4444",yellow:"#F59E0B",
  dark:"#07080F",s1:"#0E0F18",s2:"#14151F",s3:"#1A1B28",
  border:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",border2:"rgba(255,255,255,0.11)",
  text:"#E8E4F0",mid:"#8880A0",dim:"#45425A",
};
const GCV = 314159;
const LOGO = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

async function ai(system, user, onChunk) {
  const r = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
    method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},
    body: JSON.stringify({ model:"claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens:1000, stream:true,
      system, messages:[{role:"user",content:user}] })
  });
  const reader = r.body.getReader(); const dec = new TextDecoder(); let buf="";
  while(true){
    const {done,value}=await reader.read(); if(done) break;
    buf+=dec.decode(value,{stream:true});
    const lines=buf.split("\n"); buf=lines.pop();
    for(const l of lines){
      if(l.startsWith("data: ")){const d=l.slice(6).trim();if(d==="[DONE]")return;
        try{const j=JSON.parse(d);if(j?.delta?.text)onChunk(j.delta.text);}catch{}}
    }
  }
}

function Spin({size=16,color="#29ABE2"}){
  return <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" style={{animation:"spin 1s linear infinite",flexShrink:0}}>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke={color} strokeWidth="3" fill="none" strokeDasharray="60" strokeDashoffset="20"/>
    <style>{`@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}`}</style>
  </svg>;
}

// ── HELPERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Stars({n}){return <span style={{color:"#F59E0B",fontSize:"0.75rem"}}>{"★".repeat(Math.round(n))}{"☆".repeat(5-Math.round(n))}</span>;}

function LevelBadge({level}){
  const c = level==="Débutant"?"#10B981":level==="Intermédiaire"?"#F59E0B":"#EF4444";
  return <span style={{padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:c+"22",border:`1px solid ${c}44`,color:c,fontSize:"0.6rem",fontWeight:700}}>{level}</span>;
}

// ── CERTIFICATE MODAL ──────────────────────────────────────────
function CertificateModal({course, onClose}){
  const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString("fr-FR",{day:"numeric",month:"long",year:"numeric"});
  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:1100,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.9)",backdropFilter:"blur(12px)",
      display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:16}} onClick={onClose}>
      <div onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()} style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:560,background:"white",borderRadius:18,overflow:"hidden",
        boxShadow:"0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)"}}>
        {/* Certificate Header */}
        <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color},${T.blue})`,padding:"28px 24px",textAlign:"center",position:"relative"}}>
          <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,backgroundImage:"radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 1px,transparent 1px)",backgroundSize:"15px 15px"}}/>
          <div style={{position:"relative",zIndex:1}}>
            <div style={{width:60,height:60,borderRadius:"50%",overflow:"hidden",background:"white",margin:"0 auto 12px",border:"3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)"}}>
              <img src={LOGO} alt="OC" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"contain"}}/>
            </div>
            <div style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",fontSize:"0.65rem",letterSpacing:"0.2em",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>Opportunities Center — O-Cademy</div>
            <div style={{color:"white",fontSize:"1.5rem",fontWeight:900}}>Certificat de Réussite</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Certificate Body */}
        <div style={{padding:"24px",textAlign:"center",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#FEFEFE,#F8F9FA)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:"#666",marginBottom:8}}>Certifie que</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"1.4rem",fontWeight:900,color:"#1B4B8A",marginBottom:8}}>Ulrich Bakouma</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:"#666",marginBottom:6}}>a complété avec succès la formation</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"1rem",fontWeight:800,color:course.color,marginBottom:16}}>{course.title}</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",gap:20,marginBottom:16}}>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",fontWeight:900,color:"#1B4B8A"}}>{course.lessons}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:"#999"}}>Leçons</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",fontWeight:900,color:"#1B4B8A"}}>{course.duration}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:"#999"}}>Durée</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",fontWeight:900,color:"#F59E0B"}}>★ {course.rating}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:"#999"}}>Note</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{borderTop:"1px solid #EEE",paddingTop:14,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{textAlign:"left"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",fontWeight:700,color:"#1B4B8A"}}>Ulrich Bakouma</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.6rem",color:"#999"}}>CEO — Opportunities Center</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",fontWeight:700,color:"#666"}}>Délivré le</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:"#999"}}>{date}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.6rem",color:"#999"}}>N° Cert.</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#1B4B8A"}}>OCA-{course.id}-{Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 24px",background:"#F0F4F8",display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{flex:1,padding:10,borderRadius:9,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color},${T.sky})`,border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>
            📥 Télécharger le certificat
          </button>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{padding:10,borderRadius:9,border:`1px solid #DDD`,background:"white",color:"#666",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>✕</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── QUIZ MODAL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
function QuizModal({course, onClose, onPass}){
  const [current,setCurrent]=useState(0);
  const [selected,setSelected]=useState(null);
  const [answers,setAnswers]=useState([]);
  const [done,setDone]=useState(false);
  const [aiExplain,setAiExplain]=useState(""); const [aiLoading,setAiLoading]=useState(false);

  const score = answers.filter((a,i)=>a===QUIZ_QUESTIONS[i].ans).length;
  const passed = done && score >= 3;

  const next = () => {
    if(selected===null) return;
    const na=[...answers,selected];
    setAnswers(na);
    if(current<QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length-1){ setCurrent(c=>c+1); setSelected(null); }
    else setDone(true);
  };

  const getExplain = async () => {
    setAiLoading(true); setAiExplain("");
    await ai(
      "Tu es O-Cademy, tuteur IA pour OC. Explique les réponses de quiz de façon pédagogique et encourageante.",
      `Le candidat a obtenu ${score}/${QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length} au quiz "${course.title}". Explique les points clés à retenir et encourage-le.`,
      c => setAiExplain(e=>e+c)
    );
    setAiLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:1000,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.88)",backdropFilter:"blur(10px)",
      display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:14}}>
      <div style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:500,background:T.s1,borderRadius:18,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${T.border2}`}}>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color}88,${T.pi}55)`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
          <span style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:"0.9rem"}}>🧠 Quiz — {course.title}</span>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{background:"none",border:"none",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",cursor:"pointer"}}>✕</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"18px 20px"}}>
          {!done ? <>
            {/* Progress */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginBottom:16}}>
              {QUIZ_QUESTIONS.map((_,i)=><div key={i} style={{flex:1,height:4,borderRadius:2,background:i<current?T.green:i===current?T.orange:T.border}}/>)}
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:T.mid,marginBottom:8}}>Question {current+1}/{QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length}</div>
            <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.95rem",color:T.text,marginBottom:16,lineHeight:1.5}}>
              {QUIZ_QUESTIONS[current].q}
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,marginBottom:16}}>
              {QUIZ_QUESTIONS[current].opts.map((opt,i)=>(
                <div key={i} onClick={()=>setSelected(i)}
                  style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderRadius:10,border:`2px solid ${selected===i?course.color:T.border}`,
                    background:selected===i?course.color+"15":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.84rem",
                    color:selected===i?T.text:T.mid,transition:"all 0.2s",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}>
                  <div style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:"50%",border:`2px solid ${selected===i?course.color:T.dim}`,
                    background:selected===i?course.color:"transparent",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                    {selected===i&&<div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:"white"}}/>}
                  </div>
                  {opt}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <button onClick={next} disabled={selected===null}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:12,borderRadius:10,background:selected!==null?`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color},${T.orangeLt})`:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
                border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.88rem",cursor:selected!==null?"pointer":"not-allowed"}}>
              {current<QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length-1?"Question suivante →":"Terminer le quiz"}
            </button>
          </> : <>
            {/* Results */}
            <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"10px 0 20px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"4rem",marginBottom:12}}>{passed?"🎉":"📚"}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"1.5rem",fontWeight:900,color:passed?T.green:T.orange,marginBottom:6}}>
                {score}/{QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length} — {passed?"Réussi !":"Presque !"}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:T.mid,marginBottom:16}}>
                {passed?"Félicitations ! Vous avez validé ce module.":"Score minimum requis : 3/5. Réessayez !"}
              </div>
              {/* Score bar */}
              <div style={{height:8,background:T.border,borderRadius:4,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
                <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${score/QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length*100}%`,background:passed?`linear-gradient(90deg,${T.green},#059669)`:`linear-gradient(90deg,${T.orange},${T.orangeLt})`,borderRadius:4,transition:"width 0.8s"}}/>
              </div>
              <button onClick={getExplain} disabled={aiLoading} style={{padding:"7px 16px",borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(41,171,226,0.1)",
                border:`1px solid ${T.sky}33`,color:T.sky,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.72rem",fontWeight:600,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,margin:"0 auto 14px"}}>
                {aiLoading?<><Spin size={13} color={T.sky}/>O-AI explique...</>:"✨ O-AI — Explications"}
              </button>
              {aiExplain && <div style={{background:"rgba(41,171,226,0.06)",borderRadius:10,padding:12,fontSize:"0.78rem",color:T.text,lineHeight:1.7,textAlign:"left",marginBottom:14}}>{aiExplain}</div>}
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
                {passed
                  ? <button onClick={()=>onPass(course)} style={{flex:1,padding:12,borderRadius:10,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${T.green},#059669)`,border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>🏆 Obtenir le certificat</button>
                  : <button onClick={()=>{setCurrent(0);setSelected(null);setAnswers([]);setDone(false);}} style={{flex:1,padding:12,borderRadius:10,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color},${T.orangeLt})`,border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>🔄 Réessayer</button>
                }
                <button onClick={onClose} style={{padding:12,borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,background:"transparent",color:T.mid,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>Fermer</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── COURSE DETAIL ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function CourseDetail({course, onBack, onEnroll, enrolled}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("contenu");
  const [aiLesson,setAiLesson]=useState(""); const [aiLoading,setAiLoading]=useState(false);
  const [aiPrompt,setAiPrompt]=useState("");
  const [expandedMod,setExpandedMod]=useState(0);
  const [showQuiz,setShowQuiz]=useState(false);
  const [cert,setCert]=useState(null);

  const askAI = async (prompt) => {
    setAiLoading(true); setAiLesson(""); setAiPrompt(prompt);
    await ai(
      `Tu es O-Cademy, tuteur IA expert en "${course.title}". Explique de façon claire, avec exemples concrets du contexte africain. Réponds en français.`,
      prompt,
      c => setAiLesson(l=>l+c)
    );
    setAiLoading(false);
  };

  const PROMPTS = [
    "Explique le concept principal de ce cours",
    "Donne un exemple concret pour le Congo",
    "Quels sont les 3 points les plus importants ?",
    "Crée un plan d'action en 5 étapes",
    "Quelles erreurs éviter ?",
    "Comment appliquer ça avec Pi Network ?",
  ];

  return (
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:T.dark}}>
      {/* Course Hero */}
      <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color}99,${T.pi}66)`,padding:"20px 18px 0",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,backgroundImage:"radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px)",backgroundSize:"18px 18px"}}/>
        <div style={{maxWidth:700,margin:"0 auto",position:"relative"}}>
          <button onClick={onBack} style={{background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",border:"none",color:"white",borderRadius:8,padding:"7px 12px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.78rem",marginBottom:14}}>← Retour</button>
          <div style={{fontSize:"3rem",marginBottom:10}}>{course.icon}</div>
          <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:6,marginBottom:10,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <LevelBadge level={course.level}/>
            <span style={{padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:"rgba(240,122,26,0.25)",border:`1px solid ${T.orange}44`,color:T.orangeLt,fontSize:"0.6rem",fontWeight:700}}>{course.badge}</span>
            <span style={{padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",fontSize:"0.6rem"}}>{course.lang}</span>
          </div>
          <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.8rem)",fontWeight:900,color:"white",marginBottom:8,lineHeight:1.3}}>{course.title}</h1>
          <p style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",fontSize:"0.8rem",marginBottom:14,lineHeight:1.65}}>{course.description}</p>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:16,fontSize:"0.75rem",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)"}}>
            <span><Stars n={course.rating}/> {course.rating} ({course.students.toLocaleString()} étudiants)</span>
            <span>⏱ {course.duration}</span>
            <span>📚 {course.lessons} leçons</span>
            <span>👨‍🏫 {course.instructor}</span>
          </div>
          {/* Enroll */}
          <div style={{background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.4)",borderRadius:"14px 14px 0 0",padding:"16px 18px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{color:T.goldLt,fontWeight:900,fontSize:"1.1rem"}}>π {course.price.toFixed(4)}</div>
              <div style={{color:T.mid,fontSize:"0.68rem"}}>{course.priceFCFA.toLocaleString()} FCFA · GCV</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>onEnroll(course)} style={{flex:1,padding:"11px 20px",borderRadius:10,
              background:enrolled?`linear-gradient(135deg,${T.green},#059669)`:`linear-gradient(135deg,${T.orange},${T.orangeLt})`,
              border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"0.9rem",cursor:"pointer",minWidth:140}}>
              {enrolled?"✅ Continuer la formation":"🎓 S'inscrire maintenant"}
            </button>
            {enrolled&&<button onClick={()=>setShowQuiz(true)} style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderRadius:10,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${T.pi},${T.piLt})`,border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.8rem",cursor:"pointer"}}>🧠 Quiz</button>}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{maxWidth:700,margin:"0 auto",padding:"16px 14px 60px"}}>
        {/* Tabs */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,marginBottom:16,borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,paddingBottom:0}}>
          {["contenu","oai","skills"].map(t=>(
            <button key={t} onClick={()=>setTab(t)} style={{padding:"10px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t?course.color:"transparent"}`,
              background:"transparent",color:tab===t?T.text:T.mid,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:tab===t?700:400,fontSize:"0.8rem"}}>
              {t==="contenu"?"📚 Contenu":t==="oai"?"✨ Tuteur O-AI":"🏆 Compétences"}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* CONTENU TAB */}
        {tab==="contenu" && <div>
          {course.modules.map((mod,mi)=>(
            <div key={mod.id} style={{background:T.s1,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:12,marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div onClick={()=>setExpandedMod(expandedMod===mi?-1:mi)}
                style={{padding:"13px 16px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,cursor:"pointer",background:expandedMod===mi?`${course.color}11`:"transparent"}}>
                <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:`${course.color}22`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"0.8rem",fontWeight:800,color:course.color,flexShrink:0}}>{mi+1}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.85rem"}}>{mod.title}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:T.mid,marginTop:2}}>{mod.lessons.length} leçons · {mod.duration}</div>
                </div>
                <span style={{color:T.mid,fontSize:"0.8rem"}}>{expandedMod===mi?"▲":"▼"}</span>
              </div>
              {expandedMod===mi && <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
                {mod.lessons.map(lesson=>(
                  <div key={lesson.id} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,
                    opacity:!enrolled&&!lesson.free?0.5:1}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:"0.9rem",flexShrink:0}}>
                      {lesson.type==="video"?"🎬":lesson.type==="quiz"?"🧠":"🛠️"}
                    </span>
                    <div style={{flex:1}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:T.text}}>{lesson.title}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:"0.62rem",color:T.dim,marginTop:1}}>{lesson.duration}</div>
                    </div>
                    {lesson.free&&<span style={{fontSize:"0.6rem",color:T.green,background:"rgba(16,185,129,0.15)",padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:8,fontWeight:700}}>Gratuit</span>}
                    {!lesson.free&&!enrolled&&<span style={{fontSize:"0.8rem"}}>🔒</span>}
                    {(lesson.free||enrolled)&&<span style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:T.mid}}>▶</span>}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>}

        {/* O-AI TUTOR TAB */}
        {tab==="oai" && <div>
          <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(107,33,168,0.15),rgba(27,75,138,0.1))`,border:`1px solid rgba(107,33,168,0.3)`,borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:14}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,marginBottom:8}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"1.2rem"}}>🤖</span>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.88rem"}}>Tuteur O-AI — {course.title}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:T.mid}}>Posez n'importe quelle question sur ce cours</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:6,marginBottom:12}}>
              {PROMPTS.map((p,i)=>(
                <button key={i} onClick={()=>askAI(p)} style={{padding:"5px 10px",borderRadius:14,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
                  border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,color:T.mid,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.68rem",transition:"all 0.2s"}}
                  onMouseEnter={e=>{e.target.style.borderColor=course.color;e.target.style.color=course.color;}}
                  onMouseLeave={e=>{e.target.style.borderColor=T.border;e.target.style.color=T.mid;}}>{p}</button>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
              <input value={aiPrompt} onChange={e=>setAiPrompt(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&askAI(aiPrompt)}
                placeholder="Votre question sur le cours..."
                style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 12px",borderRadius:8,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
                  color:T.text,fontFamily:"inherit",fontSize:"0.82rem",outline:"none"}}/>
              <button onClick={()=>askAI(aiPrompt)} disabled={aiLoading||!aiPrompt.trim()}
                style={{padding:"9px 14px",borderRadius:8,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${course.color},${T.orangeLt})`,
                  border:"none",color:"white",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.8rem",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5}}>
                {aiLoading?<Spin size={14} color="white"/>:"→"}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          {aiLesson && (
            <div style={{background:T.s1,border:`1px solid ${T.border2}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 18px"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,marginBottom:10}}>
                <span>✨</span><span style={{color:course.color,fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.78rem"}}>Réponse O-AI</span>
                {aiLoading&&<Spin size={13} color={course.color}/>}
              </div>
              <div style={{color:T.text,fontSize:"0.85rem",lineHeight:1.8,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap"}}>{aiLesson}</div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>}

        {/* SKILLS TAB */}
        {tab==="skills" && <div>
          <div style={{background:T.s1,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,fontSize:"0.88rem"}}>🏆 Compétences acquises</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:8}}>
              {course.skills.map((s,i)=>(
                <span key={i} style={{padding:"6px 14px",borderRadius:20,background:`${course.color}18`,border:`1px solid ${course.color}44`,color:course.color,fontWeight:600,fontSize:"0.78rem"}}>✓ {s}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          {enrolled && <div style={{background:"rgba(16,185,129,0.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3)",borderRadius:12,padding:16,textAlign:"center"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:"2rem",marginBottom:8}}>🏅</div>
            <div style={{fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>Certificat disponible</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"0.75rem",color:T.mid,marginBottom:12}}>Complétez le quiz pour obtenir votre certificat officiel O-Cademy</div>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowQuiz(true)} style={{padding:"11px 24px",borderRadius:10,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${T.pi},${T.piLt})`,border:"none",color:"white",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>
              🧠 Passer le quiz final
            </button>
          </div>}
        </div>}
      </div>

      {showQuiz&&<QuizModal course={course} onClose={()=>setShowQuiz(false)} onPass={c=>{setShowQuiz(false);setCert(c);}}/>}
      {cert&&<CertificateModal course={cert} onClose={()=>setCert(null)}/>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── COURSE CARD ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function CourseCard({c, onView, enrolled}){
  const [hov,setHov]=useState(false);
  return (
    <div onMouseEnter={()=>setHov(true)} onMouseLeave={()=>setHov(false)} onClick={()=>onView(c)}
      style={{background:T.s1,border:`1.5px solid ${hov?c.color+"55":T.border}`,borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden",
        cursor:"pointer",transition:"all 0.25s",transform:hov?"translateY(-4px)":"none",boxShadow:hov?`0 12px 32px ${c.color}20`:"none"}}>
      <div style={{height:100,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${c.color}33,${c.color}11)`,
        display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"3rem",position:"relative"}}>
        {c.icon}
        <div style={{position:"absolute",top:8,left:8}}>
          <span style={{padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:c.color+"33",border:`1px solid ${c.color}55`,color:c.color,fontSize:"0.6rem",fontWeight:700}}>{c.badge}</span>
        </div>
        {enrolled&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:8,right:8,background:"rgba(16,185,129,0.9)",color:"white",fontSize:"0.6rem",padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:6,fontWeight:700}}>Inscrit</div>}
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"12px 14px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"0.6rem",color:c.color,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:"0.1em",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>{c.cat}</div>
        <div style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:"0.85rem",color:T.text,marginBottom:5,lineHeight:1.3}}>{c.title}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:T.mid,marginBottom:6}}>{c.instructor}</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,marginBottom:8}}>
          <Stars n={c.rating}/>
          <span style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:T.dim}}>({c.students.toLocaleString()})</span>
          <LevelBadge level={c.level}/>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,fontSize:"0.68rem",color:T.dim,marginBottom:10}}>
          <span>⏱ {c.duration}</span><span>📚 {c.lessons} leçons</span>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{color:T.goldLt,fontWeight:900,fontSize:"0.88rem"}}>π {c.price.toFixed(4)}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"0.62rem",color:T.dim}}>{c.priceFCFA.toLocaleString()} FCFA</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:hov?c.color:T.dim,fontWeight:600,transition:"color 0.2s",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>
            Voir le cours <span style={{transform:hov?"translateX(3px)":"none",transition:"transform 0.2s"}}>→</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── MAIN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function OCademyEnterprise(){
  const [cat,setCat]=useState("Tous");
  const [search,setSearch]=useState("");
  const [detail,setDetail]=useState(null);
  const [enrolled,setEnrolled]=useState([]);
  const [notification,setNotification]=useState(null);
  const [aiSearch,setAiSearch]=useState(""); const [aiSearchRes,setAiSearchRes]=useState(""); const [aiSLoading,setAiSLoading]=useState(false);

  const notify = msg => { setNotification(msg); setTimeout(()=>setNotification(null),2800); };

  const enroll = c => {
    if(!enrolled.includes(c.id)){
      setEnrolled(e=>[...e,c.id]);
      notify(`🎓 Inscrit à "${c.title}" !`);
    }
  };

  const searchAI = async () => {
    if(!aiSearch.trim()) return;
    setAiSLoading(true); setAiSearchRes("");
    await ai(
      "Tu es O-Cademy, conseiller formations pour OC. Recommande les meilleures formations selon les besoins.",
      `Recommande la meilleure formation parmi: ${COURSES.map(c=>c.title).join(", ")}. Besoin: ${aiSearch}. Sois précis et concis.`,
      c => setAiSearchRes(s=>s+c)
    );
    setAiSLoading(false);
  };

  if(detail) return <CourseDetail course={detail} onBack={()=>setDetail(null)} onEnroll={enroll} enrolled={enrolled.includes(detail.id)}/>;

  const filtered = COURSES.filter(c=>(cat==="Tous"||c.cat===cat)&&(c.title.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())||c.cat.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())));

  return (
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:T.dark,color:T.text,fontFamily:"'DM Sans','Segoe UI',sans-serif"}}>
      <style>{`*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:${T.dim};border-radius:2px;}@keyframes slideIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}`}</style>

      {notification&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",zIndex:9999,background:"rgba(16,185,129,0.95)",color:"white",padding:"9px 18px",borderRadius:10,fontWeight:600,fontSize:"0.8rem",boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)",animation:"slideIn 0.3s ease",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{notification}</div>}

      {/* NAV */}
      <nav style={{background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.7)",backdropFilter:"blur(12px)",padding:"0 16px",height:54,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,position:"sticky",top:0,zIndex:200}}>
        <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",overflow:"hidden",background:"white",border:`2px solid ${T.orange}`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <img src={LOGO} alt="OC" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"contain"}}/>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1}}>
          <div style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:"0.9rem"}}>O-Cademy</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.52rem",color:T.mid,letterSpacing:"0.1em"}}>OPPORTUNITIES CENTER · ENTERPRISE</div>
        </div>
        {enrolled.length>0&&<div style={{background:"rgba(16,185,129,0.2)",border:"1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.4)",borderRadius:10,padding:"5px 10px",fontSize:"0.7rem",color:T.green,fontWeight:700}}>
          📚 {enrolled.length} cours
        </div>}
      </nav>

      {/* HERO */}
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(27,75,138,0.6),rgba(230,81,0,0.3))",padding:"28px 18px 24px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,backgroundImage:"radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px,transparent 1px)",backgroundSize:"20px 20px"}}/>
        <div style={{maxWidth:700,margin:"0 auto",position:"relative"}}>
          <div style={{display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,background:"rgba(230,81,0,0.2)",border:"1px solid rgba(230,81,0,0.4)",borderRadius:20,padding:"4px 12px",fontSize:"0.65rem",color:T.orangeLt,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>
            🎓 Formation · Certificats · O-AI Tuteur · Pi Network
          </div>
          <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(1.4rem,3vw,2rem)",fontWeight:900,lineHeight:1.2,marginBottom:8,color:"white"}}>
            O-Cademy Enterprise<br/><span style={{color:T.orangeLt}}>Apprenez, Certifiez, Réussissez</span>
          </h1>
          <p style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",fontSize:"0.82rem",marginBottom:16,lineHeight:1.65}}>
            Formations professionnelles en français · Tuteur O-AI personnalisé · Certificats officiels · Payez en Pi ou FCFA
          </p>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <div style={{flex:1,position:"relative"}}>
              <span style={{position:"absolute",left:11,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",opacity:0.4}}>🔍</span>
              <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Chercher une formation..."
                style={{width:"100%",padding:"10px 12px 10px 34px",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${T.border2}`,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",color:T.text,fontFamily:"inherit",fontSize:"0.84rem",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
            </div>
            <input value={aiSearch} onChange={e=>setAiSearch(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&searchAI()}
              placeholder="Besoin O-AI..."
              style={{flex:"0 0 130px",padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${T.sky}44`,background:"rgba(41,171,226,0.08)",color:T.text,fontFamily:"inherit",fontSize:"0.78rem",outline:"none"}}/>
            <button onClick={searchAI} disabled={aiSLoading} style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,background:"rgba(41,171,226,0.15)",border:`1px solid ${T.sky}44`,color:T.sky,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.75rem",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4,flexShrink:0}}>
              {aiSLoading?<Spin size={13} color={T.sky}/>:"✨"}
            </button>
          </div>
          {aiSearchRes&&<div style={{marginTop:10,background:"rgba(41,171,226,0.08)",border:`1px solid ${T.sky}22`,borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:"0.78rem",color:T.text,lineHeight:1.7}}>{aiSearchRes}</div>}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{maxWidth:900,margin:"0 auto",padding:"16px 14px 60px"}}>
        {/* STATS */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          {[{n:COURSES.length,l:"Formations"},{n:"100%",l:"En français"},{n:"O-AI",l:"Tuteur IA"},{n:"Certifiants",l:"Diplômes"}].map((s,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{background:T.s1,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"8px 14px",textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{color:T.orangeLt,fontWeight:900,fontSize:"0.95rem"}}>{s.n}</div>
              <div style={{color:T.dim,fontSize:"0.6rem",marginTop:1,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.08em"}}>{s.l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* CATS */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",marginBottom:14,paddingBottom:4,scrollbarWidth:"none"}}>
          {CATS.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setCat(c)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",borderRadius:18,border:`1.5px solid ${cat===c?T.orange:T.border}`,background:cat===c?"rgba(240,122,26,0.18)":"transparent",color:cat===c?T.orangeLt:T.mid,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"0.7rem",whiteSpace:"nowrap",flexShrink:0}}>{c}</button>)}
        </div>

        {/* GRID */}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr))",gap:13}}>
          {filtered.map(c=><CourseCard key={c.id} c={c} onView={setDetail} enrolled={enrolled.includes(c.id)}/>)}
        </div>

        {filtered.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"60px 20px",color:T.dim}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:"2.5rem",marginBottom:12}}>🎓</div>
          <div>Aucune formation trouvée</div>
          <button onClick={()=>{setSearch("");setCat("Tous");}} style={{marginTop:12,padding:"8px 18px",borderRadius:8,background:T.orange,border:"none",color:"white",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"0.8rem"}}>Réinitialiser</button>
        </div>}

        {/* FOOTER */}
        <div style={{marginTop:30,padding:"16px 18px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(27,75,138,0.1),rgba(230,81,0,0.06))`,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:12,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12}}>
          <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:8,overflow:"hidden",background:"white",flexShrink:0}}>
            <img src={LOGO} alt="OC" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"contain"}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>O-Cademy — Opportunities Center</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:T.dim}}>Congo Brazzaville · opportunitiescenter.pi · GCV 1π=$314,159</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
